overview: I built multi-agent systems across 6 days — redesigning my Feature Spec Generator, ROI Analyzer, and Conversation Manager. Key lessons: a 3x cost premium ($0.05 vs $0.15/run) is justified at low volume but becomes $365K/year at scale.

keyPoints.title: Shared state beats parameter passing for agent coordination
Tool calling corrected ROI from ~100% guess to -98% actual
5 failure patterns map to 5 resilience strategies
Retry logic adds 2-3x API calls; resilience has real cost
